command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute 
-- Assign all permissions to Super Admin (role id 1)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 1, id FROM permissions;

-- Assign most permissions to Admin (role id 2) - exclude super admin specific
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 2, id FROM permissions WHERE code NOT IN ('settings:edit');

-- Assign Security Manager permissions (role id 3)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 3, id FROM permissions WHERE module IN ('dashboard', 'requests', 'approvals', 'reports', 'sites', 'zones', 'groups', 'users') 
AND action NOT IN ('delete', 'assign_role');

-- Assign Site Manager permissions (role id 4)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 4, id FROM permissions WHERE module IN ('dashboard', 'requests', 'approvals', 'reports', 'zones', 'groups')
AND code NOT IN ('requests:view_all', 'groups:delete');

-- Assign Security Officer permissions (role id 5)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 5, id FROM permissions WHERE code IN (
  'dashboard:view', 'requests:view_site', 'requests:create', 'requests:edit',
  'approvals:view', 'approvals:approve', 'approvals:reject', 'approvals:send_back',
  'zones:view', 'groups:view', 'reports:view'
);

-- Assign Account Manager permissions (role id 6)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 6, id FROM permissions WHERE code IN (
  'dashboard:view', 'requests:view_group', 'requests:create', 'requests:edit', 'requests:cancel',
  'approvals:view', 'approvals:approve', 'approvals:reject', 'approvals:send_back',
  'groups:view', 'groups:manage_members', 'reports:view', 'reports:export'
);

-- Assign Approver permissions (role id 7)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 7, id FROM permissions WHERE code IN (
  'dashboard:view', 'requests:view_group', 'requests:create', 'requests:edit', 'requests:cancel',
  'approvals:view', 'approvals:approve', 'approvals:reject', 'approvals:send_back',
  'groups:view', 'reports:view'
);

-- Assign Requestor permissions (role id 8)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 8, id FROM permissions WHERE code IN (
  'dashboard:view', 'requests:view_own', 'requests:create', 'requests:edit', 'requests:cancel',
  'groups:view'
);

-- Assign Viewer permissions (role id 9)
INSERT INTO rolePermissions (roleId, permissionId)
SELECT 9, id FROM permissions WHERE code IN (
  'dashboard:view', 'requests:view_own', 'groups:view', 'reports:view'
);
